steps.title: Use the interpretation clue
steps.content: The dash explains the blank: Farah's compositions allow as many different interpretations as there are listeners. The word in the blank must mean many or countless.

steps.title: Choose abundance
steps.content: Choice A means shallow, choice C means lacking, and choice D means indefensible. Those meanings conflict with the idea that many interpretations can be valid. "Myriad" means countless or very many. The answer is B.
